name: lakshx-commentary
description: A standalone in-IDE music player for vibe coders — stream free, embed-permitted internet radio (Radio Paradise) or your own local CC0/CC-BY tracks in a small webview panel. No LLM calls, no telemetry.

commands.title: LakshX Music: Pick Station / Add Custom Stream

lakshx.music.enabled.description: LakshX Music player. OFF by default (opt-in). When on, a player panel is available and the '$(play) LakshX Music' status-bar item lets you start/pause it. The first play must be a click inside the player panel (browser autoplay rules).

lakshx.music.station.description: The current LakshX Music station: a built-in id ('rp-main' = Radio Paradise Main Mix, 'rp-mellow' = Mellow Mix, 'rp-rock' = Rock Mix, 'rp-global' = Global/World Mix), or a custom https:// stream URL you added via 'LakshX Music: Pick Station / Add Custom Stream'.

lakshx.music.volume.description: LakshX Music playback volume (0–100). Also settable live from the volume slider in the player panel.
